prompt:
An entry-level FDM 3D printer with the hotend area in clear focus: a clean, freshly installed 0.4 mm nozzle seated in the heater block, with a small wrench and a spare nozzle resting on a silicone mat. A faint warm glow from the hotend assembly suggests it was torqued at temperature, while avoiding any readable temperature numbers or UI text.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future solarpunk workshop aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, realistic metal reflections, no brand logos, no readable screens, and no on-image text. Composition is clean and icon-friendly, with the nozzle/hotend clearly identifiable.
